examples: "It is still difficult for a biped robot to walk on a bumpy surface, even on Earth," the official said.
A biped is a creature with two legs.
You're only asking for trouble if you want to make something like a biped with camera vision and an arm to get you a beer.
Cars whizzed by at 45 miles an hour, honking at the two-foot-wide biped awkwardly blocking their lane.
